title: Incorrect range inheritance in port declaration

features.name: ansi_port_width_inheritance_bug
features.description: Code should include an ANSI-style module port declaration where a port with explicit width is followed by a port declared with port kind keyword but no explicit width, triggering incorrect width inheritance

features.name: interleaved_port_kinds_in_ansi_list
features.description: Code should include an ANSI-style port list where port kind keyword (wire) is specified but width is omitted for a port after a wider port, relying on IEEE default width behavior
features.snippet:
input wire [7:0] a,
input wire b,
output wire c
